name: Watercolor Shower Curtain Blue  - Threshold™
description:
Bring artistic flair to your bath space with this Luxe Watercolor Print Shower Curtain from Threshold™. Made from 100% cotton sateen fabric for a luxe feel, this decorative shower curtain features an abstract watercolor-like print in ombre blue, rust and brown hues on a light gray background for a striking effect. Machine washable for easy cleaning when needed, it features a buttonhole top for quick installation.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
